scripts.install:all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.client: cd client && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build: npm run server && npm run client
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run start:server" "npm run start:client"
scripts.start: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run start:server" "npm run start:client"
